sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90856" key="prutani=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρῠτᾰν-ῖτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, as title of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἑστία</foreign>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρυτανεία</foreign> (B), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2384.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Herm.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
